data.name: Consent.Info
data.value: [XS] Please select the grower's consent level for photo use and provide their signature below.

data.name: Consent.Full.Description
data.value: [XS] You may use my photo with my name identified

data.name: Consent.Limited.Description
data.value: [XS] You may use my picture in group photos without my name

data.name: Consent.None.Description
data.value: [XS] You may not use my photo at all

data.name: Signature.Info
data.value: Kombela u nyika kusayina ku tiyisisa nhlayo leyi hlawulekeke ya nvumelano

data.name: Signature.Help
data.value: Dirowa kusayina ka wena hi xivomba xa wena kumbe mouse

data.name: Signature.Confirm
data.value: [XS] I confirm this consent level has been explained to and agreed by the grower

data.name: Message.LoadError
data.value: Xiphiqo xi Humelele eka ku Loda Nkandziyiso

data.name: Message.EnrollmentNotFound
data.value: [XS] Enrollment not found or you do not have permission to view it.

data.name: Message.AlreadyCaptured
data.value: [XS] Consent has already been recorded as:

data.name: Message.CanUpdate
data.value: [XS] You can update the consent level and signature below.

data.name: Message.ValidationError
data.value: [XS] Please confirm the consent level before saving

data.name: Message.SignatureRequired
data.value: Kusayina swi laveka — kombela u dirowa kusayina ka wena laha henhla

data.name: Message.Error
data.value: [XS] Error saving photo consent. Please try again.
